emails.subject: Re: Dow Jones Index Prices - Database Access
emails.subject_base: Dow Jones Index Prices - Database Access
emails.body: I've started to transfer my Dow Jones e-mails into five separate folders which can be found at: P:\Scheduling\Dow Jones Cob\Mead\Mid-C\NP-SP\Palo You can already access February's files for each of these delivery points, and prior months will be coming in soon as I have free moments in the day. Thanks, Kate Cara Semperger 02/22/2001 08:15 AM
